summaryPreview: Marketplace Carrier Status Developed by Complete Genome Science Comprehensive genetic screening for common and rare inherited conditions, including Cystic Fibrosis and many others. $29 per genome
bodyPreview: Marketplace Carrier Status Developed by Complete Genome Science Comprehensive genetic screening for common and rare inherited conditions, including Cystic Fibrosis and many others. $29 per genome Start Report View Sample Report Get 100% of your DNA data with Whole Genome Sequencing. Already have data from a DNA test? Upload your data for free. Inherited conditions are determined by genetic makeup rather than environmental factors. The Inherited Conditions DNA Report includes status labels such as Absent, Carrier, or Affected for common and rare inherited conditions curated into inherited carrier status, inherited X-linked conditions, and actionable conditions.

headings.text: Carrier Status: Inherited Conditions DNA Report

meta.author: Sequencing
meta.description: Comprehensive genetic screening and analysis for rare diseases. Upload your DNA data from almost any DNA tests to receive the Carrier Status DNA Report for orphan diseases.
